analystDecision: Press the best longs, but keep entries disciplined.
riskPosture: Risk is not gone. Respect the trim list and do not turn watchlist names into forced trades.
operatorSummary: The board reads constructive risk-on, with 6 buy setups and 2 risk-reduction names. Current evaluation history shows 100.0% 1D hit rate, so the edge looks real but still young.
nextSessionPlan: Open with MRVL, AMD, SMCI on the main board, keep DELL, ORCL marked for risk control, and let weaker holds prove themselves before touching them.

newsItems.title: Marvell stock extends gains after a 32% pop as Nvidia CEO calls chipmaker 'the next trillion-dollar company'
newsItems.summary: Marvell stock jumped after Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called the custom chipmaker 'the next trillion-dollar company.'

newsItems.title: Intel Stock Jumps After 5-Day Losing Streak. Markets Get a Reminder of Its CPU Strength.
newsItems.summary: Intel stock was back on the rise Wednesday, gaining 4.4% to $112.71, and snapping a five-day losing streak. As of the closing bell on Tuesday, the shares had fallen 13% over its losing run and were down 22% from their closing high of $129.44 on May 11.
